title: Area SEND framework: findings from the first 2 years of inspections
body: "This report aims to inform future improvements to the special educational needs and/or disabilities (SEND) system by highlighting examples of effective practice and identifying where there are national systemic issues.  The report shares findings from the first 2 years of inspections under the current area SEND inspection framework.   Read our 2025 review of the area SEND inspection framework and what we will do to improve inspections going forward.   "

taxons.title: Inspection of local authority support for schools
Support for special educational needs and disability (SEND)
